visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) In a brightly lit Costco warehouse, a woman with long dark hair, wearing a black top and white boots, stands before a large stack of 'Great Day' food boxes. She holds one box of Silver Fungus Almond Soup with Oats, gesturing enthusiastically to the camera while showcasing the packaging. (2) The scene transitions to an indoor living room where two women sit at a table. They have a large glass bowl of white soup and a box of the product. They point at the soup and smile at the camera. (3) A close-up shot shows a thick, creamy white liquid with visible chunks of silver fungus and oats being poured from a pink-accented pouch into a glass bowl. (4) Back at the table, the women use a large spoon to lift and display the thick consistency and plentiful ingredients of the soup. They give thumbs up and perform expressive hand gestures to convey satisfaction.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: Costco Wholesale. [Slogan]: 杏仁味超濃厚! 銀耳燕麥杏仁露. 得意的一天. (2) [Subtitle]: 最新出了 銀耳燕麥杏仁露. (3) [Subtitle]: 因為上次芋頭很驚艷這個... [Slogan]: 銀耳燕麥杏仁露. (4) [Subtitle]: 上次芋頭西米露有驚艷到我們. (5) [Subtitle]: 因為我們本來抱持著 大概10分 只有2分的心情. (6) [Subtitle]: 嘿 結果就吃起來哦 8.5分. (7) [Subtitle]: 那就來試試看 它的新口味. (8) [Subtitle]: 我們會很嚴格 希望它還是繼續得意. [Variety]: 繼續得意的一天. (9) [Slogan]: 得意的一天! 燕麥銀耳杏仁露. [Subtitle]: 得意的一天! (10) [Subtitle]: 這一箱399元. (11) [Subtitle]: 裡面有三包 所以每一包是133塊. (12) [Subtitle]: 然後它這樣子一碗呢 就是133塊的量. (13) [Subtitle]: 適合3到4人家庭吃. (14) [Subtitle]: 我們把它冰冰箱. (15) [Subtitle]: 或者你要加熱直接用 都可以. (16) [Subtitle]: 我覺得它料 你們來看. [Variety]: 很濃郁. (17) [Subtitle]: 這個料給的很誠意. [Variety]: 很過癮. (18) [Subtitle]: 裡面有非常多的銀耳 然後燕麥也是滿滿的. (19) [Subtitle]: 最重要這個杏仁呢 很濃郁 超級濃郁的. (20) [Subtitle]: 所以我覺得吃起來就是 很過癮. (21) [Subtitle]: 喜歡杏仁的人不要錯過它的杏仁味. (22) [Subtitle]: 真是非常誠意 給好給滿. (23) [Subtitle]: 夏天冰冰的 吃飯後來一小碗哦 高級甜湯.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a black top, black skirt, and white boots. The other wears a brownish top and a zebra-patterned hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A warehouse setting with stacks of palletized boxes and signage, followed by a domestic living room with a table, sofa, and plush toys.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced electronic BGM starts immediately. A high-energy female voice speaks with rapid articulation and an excited, rising intonation pattern. (2) A synthetic 'Whoosh' sound effect marks a transition. The acoustics shift from a slightly reverberant store to a drier indoor domestic space. (3) The sound of liquid pouring (a soft splash SFX) is layered over the BGM during the close-up. Speech continues at a high density. (4) Multiple 'Ding' sound effects punctuate the appearance of graphic overlays. The speakers maintain high vocal arousal, concluding with a positive, assertive tone as the music track stingers out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Comparison Context -> Unboxing/Pouring -> Detailed Texture Display -> Value Evaluation -> Final Recommendation.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the 'Great Day' Silver Fungus Almond Soup with Oats available at Costco by highlighting its richness, visible ingredients, and cost-effectiveness through an enthusiastic firsthand review.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product boxes, repeated mention of brand name, and detailed pricing information.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-density social media editing style with bright colors and constant subtitles aimed at a mobile audience.
